title: fagelia nudicaulis
intro: Fagelia nudicaulis, also known as the fawn lily or green adder's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Fagelia nudicaulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Fagelia nudicaulis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
